Abyssal Angel (Legend): Recommended enhancement: Spellbreaker. Abyssal Angels are the strategists of the Nation. Trained by Revontheus to wield Crystal Weaponry, they excel at fighting multiple enemies with arrows forged by Nulgath. Abyssal Angels have various ways of taking their opponents down.
Abyssal Angel's Shadow (0 AC): Recommended enhancement: Spellbreaker. Trained by Revontheus to wield Crystal Weaponry, they excel at fighting multiple enemies with arrows forged by Nulgath. Abyssal Angels have various ways of taking their opponents down.
Abyssal Angel's Shadow (AC): Recommended enhancement: Spellbreaker. Trained by Revontheus to wield Crystal Weaponry, they excel at fighting multiple enemies. Abyssal Angels have various ways of taking their opponents down.
Acolyte: [Duplicate of Healer Class] Recommended enhancement: Healer. Healer base class upgrade!
Alpha DOOMmega: [Duplicate of Alpha Omega Class] Recommended enhancement: Fighter. Be the beginning AND the end of ALL your battles in the Alpha Omega Class!
Alpha Omega (Legend): Recommended enhancement: Fighter. Be the beginning AND the end of ALL your battles in the Alpha Omega Class!
Alpha Omega (Non-Legend): Recommended enhancement: Fighter. Be the beginning AND the end of ALL your battles in the Alpha Omega Class!
Alpha Pirate (Class): [Duplicate of Pirate Class] Recommended enhancement: Lucky. Pirates are opportunistic rogues and treasure hunters of the sea. Combat might not always go their way but they will do the best they can to make the most of any combat situation they find themselves in. You never really know what move a pirate will make next, and just as often, they don't know either.
Antique Hunter (Class) (0 AC): (Duplicate of Artifact Hunter Class) Recommended enhancement: Hybrid. Antique hunters explore the dark corners of lore, selectively looking for rare and powerful artifacts to aid them in their battles and adventures.
Antique Hunter (Class) (AC): (Duplicate of Artifact Hunter Class) Recommended enhancement: Hybrid. Antique hunters explore the dark corners of lore, selectively looking for rare and powerful artifacts to aid them in their battles and adventures.
Arachnomancer (AC): Recommended enhancement: Hybrid. Spin the web and lure your prey. Patience is the key to the perfect attack. The trap is set, now you wait. Ready…waiting…in the shadows.
Arcane Dark Caster: Recommended enhancement: Wizard. Dage has come around to gifting you with his set of shadow skills in the Arcane Dark Arts and you have become one of his legion's elite casters! (This item cannot be sold until April 6th)
ArchFiend (0 AC): Recommended Enhancement: Lucky. The mighty ArchFiends of the Abyss draw power from the eternal darkness, and wash over their foes in a wave of carnage. Conscripted into service for the Abyssal Army for an eternity, ArchFiends are forever loyal.
ArchFiend (AC): Recommended Enhancement: Lucky. The mighty ArchFiends of the Abyss draw power from the eternal darkness, and wash over their foes in a wave of carnage. Conscripted into service for the Abyssal Army for an eternity, ArchFiends are forever loyal.
Artifact Hunter (Class) (AC): Recommended enhancement: Hybrid. Artifact hunters explore Lore selectively looking for rare and powerful artifacts to aid them in their battles and adventures.
Artifact Hunter (Class) (Merge): Recommended enhancement: Hybrid. Artifact hunters explore lore selectively looking for rare and powerful artifacts to aid them in their battles and adventures.
Barber: Recommended enhancement: Luck. Hair today, gone tomorrow! Be a barber and control the destiny of your friends and neighbors.
Bard (Class): Recommended enhancement: Healer. Music rocks your world, and the battlefield. Your special abilities allow you to stay in tune with those around you, whether your powers are used to heal or to hurt.
Battle Bard: This class is a modified version of Bard only usable in PvP maps, designed for
Battle Healer: This class is used to test the upcoming PvP changes for classes within the PvP system. This item may change at any time. Refer to the Design Notes for information about the PvP system!
BattleMage (Class): Recommended enhancement: Wizard, Lucky. Battlemages focus on taking down their opponents as quickly as possible. They are capable of focusing greater amounts of mana into each spell for the maximum effect.
Beast Warrior: [Duplicate of Warrior Class] Recommended enhancement: Fighter. Graaawwwwwrrr!
BeastMaster (AC): Recommended enhancement: Hybrid. Come forth those who wish to master the beasts of the land and birds of the air, for now you have that chance!
BladeMaster (0 AC): Recommended enhancement: Thief. The shadowy assassins of the Undead Legion, Blademasters move inhumanly fast. By the time you see them strike, their blades have already drawn blood.
BladeMaster (AC): Recommended enhancement: Thief. The shadowy assassins of the Undead Legion, Blademasters move inhumanly fast. By the time you see them strike, their blades have already drawn blood.
BladeMaster Assassin: Recommended enhancement: Thief. BladeMaster Assassins have always been a mystery, physically and mentally. Never seen by their foe, using the ancient ninja arts to help them overcome their enemies.
Blaze Binder (AC): Recommended enhancement: Wizard. Fire Binders control the power of fire and darkness. They are known to burn their enemies to a crisp and bind their souls into service.
Blaze Binder (Merge): Recommended enhancement: Wizard. Fire Binders control the power of fire and darkness. They are known to burn their enemies to a crisp and bind their souls into service.
Blood Ancient (AC): Recommended enhancement: Fighter. You have consumed the essences of many great vampire warlords, and now all of their powers are yours. You have embodied vampiric strength into a living mortal.
Blood Ancient (Merge): Recommended enhancement: Fighter. You have consumed the essences of many great vampire warlords, and now all of their powers are yours. You have embodied vampiric strength into a living mortal.
Blood Titan (Legend): Recommended enhancement: Fighter. Coming from a long line of titans, your blood is especially potent. You have mastered the ability of calling on the power running through your veins to bring devastation to your foes.
CardClasher (Class): Recommended enhancement: Lucky, Thief. You received the Color Custom CardClasher Class from your purchase of the AdventureQuest Worlds Anything Goes Battleon Battlecards Card Game. But you probably knew that.
Chaos Avenger Member Preview: Recommended enhancement: Lucky. This is a temporary test version of Chaos Avenger. Icons, class art and skills are temporary and subject to change. Please tweet
Chaos Champion Prime (Class): [Duplicate of Chaos Slayer Class] Recommended enhancement: Hybrid. Now YOU may wield the powers of the Champion of Chaos! MUHAHAHAHAHAA!!
Chaos Shaper (Class): Recommended enhancements: Fighter, Lucky. You have come to understand that Chaos is a tool that can be used for neither good nor evil. Mastering it could make you powerful beyond imagining…
Chaos Slayer Berserker (AC): [Duplicate of Chaos Slayer Class] Recommended enhancement: Hybrid. With the power of Chaos comes great responsi… wait, who are we kidding. CHAOS!!!
Chaos Slayer Cleric (AC): [Duplicate of Chaos Slayer Class] Recommended enhancement: Hybrid. For clerics of Chaos who wish to wield its power.
Chaos Slayer Mystic (AC): [Duplicate of Chaos Slayer Class] For those who worship Chaos, and wish to wield its power.
Chaos Slayer Thief (AC): [Duplicate of Chaos Slayer Class] Recommended enhancement: Hybrid. You can be chaotic and still hide in the shadows, like every other rogue!
Chrono Assassin (AC): Recommended enhancement: Thief. Master time and space like Xeven. Tear through the fabric of time literally as a Chrono Assassin.
Chrono Assassin (Merge): Recommended enhancement: Thief. Master time and space like Xeven. Tear through the fabric of time literally as a Chrono Assassin.
Chrono Chaorruptor: Recommended enhancement: Hybrid. Time flies in a straight line, unless its Chaorrupted! You'll never know in which time, or with what powers you'll wind up when you have this armor equipped!
Chrono Commandant: Recommended enhancement: Fighter. Command the hours and control the eons… for the very fabric of time is under your power!
Chrono DataKnight: Recommended enhancement: Wizard. Battle alongside the Dragons of Time as you attempt to command the universe!
Chrono DragonKnight (Class): Recommended enhancement: Wizard. Battle alongside the Dragons of Time as you attempt to command the universe!
ChronoCommander: Recommended enhancement: Fighter. Command the hours and control the eons… for the very fabric of time
ChronoCorruptor: Recommended enhancement: Hybrid. Time flies in a straight line, unless its Chaorrupted! You'll never know in which time, or with what powers you'll wind up when you have this armor equipped.
Chronomancer: Recommended enhancement: Hybrid. As celestial manipulators, Chronomancers alter the flow of time with supernatural divinations and otherwordly expertise.
Chronomancer Prime: Recommended enhancement: Hybrid. As celestial manipulators, Chronomancers alter the flow of time with supernatural divinations and otherwordly expertise.
Chunin (AC): Recommended enhancement: Fighter. A chunin is a ninja field commander. Highly trained to attack from stealth but focusing on strength and power rather than agility and speed.
Chunin (Merge): Recommended enhancement: Thief. A chunin is a ninja field commander. Highly trained to attack from stealth but focusing on strength and power rather than agility and speed. A chunin can handle multiple enemies at once.
Classic Alpha Pirate: [Duplicate of Rogue Class] Recommended enhancement: Thief. A commemorative armor reminding us of the infamous day where the pirate Captain Rhubarb seized control of that database.
Classic Barber: [Duplicate of Rogue Class] Recommended enhancement: Thief. Hair today, gone tomorrow! Be a barber and control the destiny of your friends and neighbors.
Classic Defender (1):
Fighter. Defenders understand the sacrifices one must make during combat.Loyal to their brethren, Defenders will see to it that what they start ends in victory.
Current Description
A basic attack, taught to all adventurers. Damage dealt is based on your weapon damage.
Classic Defender (2): A basic attack, taught to all adventurers. Damage dealt is based on your weapon damage.
Classic Defender (3):
Fighter. Defenders understand the sacrifices one must make during combat.Loyal to their brethren, Defenders will see to it that what they start ends in victory.
Current Description
A basic attack, taught to all adventurers. Damage dealt is based on your weapon damage.
Classic DoomKnight (AC): Recommended enhancement: Fighter. Feared throughout history, the Doomknight shows little sympathy for the living. Not even death could stop your destructive rampage.
Classic Dragonlord: Recommended enhancement: Fighter. Dragonlords make aggressive front-line soldiers. They are skilled in an ancient school of enchanted combat arts ranging back from the era of DragonFable. Only those with Dragon Amulets will have the honor of becoming a DragonLord.
Classic Exalted Soul Cleaver: [Duplicate of Classic Soul Cleaver] Recommended enhancement: Hybrid. Vowing loyalty to the legion has it's perks. The Soul Cleaver fights best on the brink of death where he can channel his magical abilities to shred his opponent… starting with it's soul.
Classic Guardian: Recommended enhancement: Hybrid. Since the dawning of Lore, the Guardians of AdventureQuest have been stoic, loyal fighters, proving their undying dedication on the battlefield.
Classic Legion DoomKnight (AC): Recommended enhancement: Hybrid, Fighter. Even DoomKnights swear their service to, or are made to serve Dage. Their
Classic Legion DoomKnight (Merge) (2): Recommended enhancement: Hybrid, Fighter. Even DoomKnights swear their service to, or are made to serve Dage. Their
Classic Pirate (Class): [Duplicate of Rogue Class] Recommended enhancement: Thief. Yarrr! Avast me hearty, this not be a class for ye lilly livered land lubbers.
Classic Soul Cleaver: Recommended enhancement: Hybrid. Vowing loyalty to the legion has it's perks. The Soul Cleaver fights best on the brink of death where he can channel his magical abilities to shred his opponent… starting with it's soul.
Continuum Chronomancer (Class): Recommended Enhancements: Lucky. Quantum Chronomancers have mastered the ability to cross between universes and ages. (Animations and Icons are Work in Progress!)
Corrupted Chronomancer (Class): Recommended Enhancements: Lucky, Hybrid. Corrupted Chronomancers rely on Hourglasses and Corruption they create using their Hourglass Pet (equipable items found in the Book of Lore) to manipulate and distort time itself.
Cryomancer (AC): Recommended enhancement: Wizard. Unleash the power of ice and snow! Freeze your enemies on the spot, making them shiver in fear. Let it go since the cold never bothered you anyways.
Cryomancer (Merge): Recommended enhancement: Wizard. Unleash the power of ice and snow! Freeze your enemies on the spot, making them shiver in fear. Let it go since the cold never bothered you anyways.
Daimon (Legend): Recommended enhancement: Wizard. You have honed your psychic abilities to work in unison with your weaponry, but understand that working in tandem with allies can make the difference between victory and defeat.
Dark BattleMage (Legend): [Duplicate of BattleMage Class] Recommended enhancement: Wizard, Lucky.This is the one you'll ant to be wearing when you decide to brave the toy store.
Dark Caster (Class): Recommended enhancement: Wizard. Dage's promise fulfilled to his Undead Legion.
Dark Chaos Berserker: Recommended Enhancement: Hybrid. With the power of Chaos comes great responsi… wait, who are we kidding. CHAOS!!!
Dark Cryomancer: Recommended enhancement: Wizard. Dark ice is the deadliest ice, so it stands to reason mages who wield the power of dark ice would be even cooler than normal.
Dark Harbinger (0 AC): [Duplicate of Exalted Harbinger Class] Recommended Enhancement: Luck. For the Legion, at any cost! Your task is to harness the souls of the enemies of the legion. Break, leech, rend, and snare their will to live. Lose yourself to the power, lose yourself to the legion!
Dark Harbinger (AC): [Duplicate of Exalted Harbinger Class] Recommended Enhancement: Luck. For the Legion, at any cost! Your task is to harness the souls of the enemies of the legion. Break, leech, rend, and snare their will to live. Lose yourself to the power, lose yourself to the legion!
Dark Legendary Hero: [Duplicate of Legendary Hero Class] Recommended enhancement: Fighter. You are truly one of Lore's greatest heroes! Because of your support and efforts in battle, the world will be saved!
Dark Lord: Recommended enhancement: Wizard. Dark Lords channel the power of the Fourth to further their goal of taking over the universe for the dark side. (And they have cookies!)
Dark Master of Moglins: [Duplicate of Master of Moglins class]Recommended enhancement: Wizard. You see a shadowy shape that resembles a Shadow Master of Moglins Class. Once the Shadow Mages finish their summon spell, you will see your class!
Dark Metal Necro: [Duplicate of Heavy Metal Necro Class] Recommended enhancement: Fighter/Luck Heavy Metal Necros are a force to be reckoned with in a mosh pit. Like the band, they're die hard fans of, they utilize their deathly riffs, mighty voices, and necromantic abilities to crush their foes into submissions.
Dark Ultra OmniNight (0 AC): (Duplicate of Ultra OmniKnight Class) Recommended enhancement: Wizard. You've fought enemies across multiple different universes, learned to harness the unstable energies from their worlds required to stop them, and earned the right to call yourself an Ultra OmniKnight!
Dark Ultra OmniNight (AC): (Duplicate of Ultra OmniKnight Class) Recommended enhancement: Wizard. You've fought enemies across multiple different universes, learned to harness the unstable energies from their worlds required to stop them, and earned the right to call yourself an Ultra OmniKnight!
Darkblood StormKing (AC): Recommended enhancement: Wizard. The Darkblood have always lived beneath the constant roiling storm that covers Thunderforge.
Darkside: Recommended enhancement: Wizard. Vader Darkside wished that the Cheezburger changed into a farming based, pet class in-game and thus the Darkside Class was born! (Must have minion summoned or battle pet equipped for skills to work)
DeathKnight (Class) (AC): *Note your Weapon Range will show 0-0 while this is equipped* Recommended enhancement: Fighter. Have you have been pulled from the cold comfort of death to serve a new master or has your own will pulled you back to the land of the living to continue fighting?
Defender (1): Recommended enhancement: Luck. As renowned protectors of alternate universes, Defenders understand the sacrifices one must make during combat. Defenders will see to it that what they start always ends in victory.
Defender (2): Recommended enhancement: Luck. As renowned protectors of alternate universes, Defenders understand the sacrifices one must make during combat. Defenders will see to it that what they start always ends in victory.
Defender (3): Recommended enhancement: Luck. As renowned protectors of alternate universes, Defenders understand the sacrifices one must make during combat. Defenders will see to it that what they start always ends in victory.
DoomKnight (AC): Recommended enhancement: Fighter. Feared throughout history, the DoomKnight shows little sympathy for the living. Not even death could stop your destructive rampage.
DoomKnight OverLord: Recommended enhancement: Hybrid. The darkness has cut right to the center of your being. You are no mere DoomKnight who serves the dark. You are a DoomKnight OverLord and the darkness serves YOU.
Dragon Knight (Class): Recommended enhancement: Wizard. Blast your enemies to bits… then use their parts to build new creatures!
Dragon of Time (Class): Recommended enhancements: Wizard, Healer, Hybrid. The Eternal Dragon of Time is one of the most powerful beings Lore has ever seen. Torn by war, corrupted by Chaos, and reborn anew to walk Lore once more - wield the power wisely.
Dragon Shinobi (Class) (AC): Recommended enhancement: Thief. Ninjas are hailed for their dexterity. Dragons are praised for their strength. And when the Ninja trains in the way of the Dragon, they shall become a master of brutal warfare!
Dragon Shinobi (Class) (Merge): Recommended enhancement: Thief. Ninjas are hailed for their dexterity. Dragons are praised for their strength. And when the Ninja trains in the way of the Dragon, they shall become a master of brutal warfare!
Dragonlord (Class): Recommended enhancements: Lucky. Armed with the might, wisdom, and cunning of ancient dragons, the DragonLord charges into battle with their bonded dragon at their side. Those worthy of greater power can evolve and unleash their elemental draconic magic to devastate the battlefield.
Dragonslayer General (Class) (AC): Recommended enhancement: Fighter. Congratulations, you've proven your worth as a Dragonslayer
Dragonslayer General (Class) (Merge): Recommended enhancement: Fighter. Congratulations, you've proven your worth as a Dragonslayer
DragonSoul Shinobi (Class): Recommended enhancement: Thief. Ninjas are hailed for their dexterity. Dragons are praised for their strength. And when the Ninja trains in the way of the Dragon, they shall become the Dragon Shinobi, master of brutal warfare!
Elemental Dracomancer (AC): Recommended enhancement: Wizard. Terrifyingly large and in charge, this armor will drive the weak from you and bring the true villains to your feet. Take your weapon, Hero, and lay waste to those who stand against you.
Empyrean Chronomancer: Recommended Enhancements: Lucky. Empyrean Chronomancers seem to have simply always existed. Their bodies transcend space and time and can be in all dimensions and infinities at once. Others who control time revere them and are strengthened by their presence. To tap into this strength requires particular insight though.
Enchanted Vampire Lord (Class): [Duplicate of Vampire Lord Class] Recommended Enhancements: Wizard, Lucky. Vampire Lords rule over their sanguine servants and, feasting on the blood of mortals, they can live forever. Don't show one a mirror though, or you might not like what you don't see.
Enforcer: [Duplicate of ProtoSartorium Class] Recommended enhancement: Hybrid. This armor makes you feel like a tank!
Eternal Chronomancer (Class): Recommended Enhancements: Lucky. Eternal Chronomancers seem to have simply always existed. Their bodies transcend space and time and can be in all dimensions and infinities at once. Others who control time revere them and are strengthened by their presence. To tap into this strength requires particular insight though.
Eternal Inversionist (Class) (AC): Recommended enhancement: Fighter. Once worn by temple priests in the northern Sandsea, frequent mishaps by mischievous spirits forced them to abandon their sacred values to tame them. They have been slaying spirits since, but their gilded attire is all that remain of who they once were.
Evolved Dark Caster: Recommended enhancement: Wizard. Channel the power of darkness to unleash your TRUE power!
Evolved Leprechaun (AC): Recommended enhancement: Lucky. Luck is on your side. You have taken being a Leprechaun to a whole new level and you let your amazing Luck guide you into battle!
Evolved Leprechaun (Merge): Recommended enhancement: Lucky. Luck is on your side. You have taken being a Leprechaun to a whole new level and you let your amazing Luck guide you into battle!
Evolved Pumpkin Lord (Legend): Recommended enhancement: Fighter. Pumpkin lords are evil magical pumpkins that are a lot more menacing than the name suggests.
Evolved Pumpkin Lord (Non-Legend): Recommended enhancement: Fighter. Pumpkin lords are evil magical pumpkins that are a lot more menacing than the name suggests. (This item will return every Halloween.)
Evolved Shaman (AC): Recommended enhancement: Spellbreaker. Shamans share a deep connection with Lore's four main elements. Within the Shaman sect there lies a core group who have gone beyond and found something deeper.
Exalted Harbinger: Recommended Enhancement: Luck. For the Legion, at any cost! Your task is to harness the souls of the enemies of the legion. Break, leech, rend, and snare their will to live. Lose yourself to the power, lose yourself to the legion!
FireLord Summoner (Class): Recommended enhancement: Wizard. FireLord Summoners control the power of fire and darkness. They are known to burn their enemies to a crisp and bind their souls into service.
Flame Dragon Warrior (Class): Recommended enhancement: Fighter. Raise the dragons in AQ Dragons then don the class in AQW to show your support for the game.
Frostval Barbarian (0 AC): Recommended enhancement: Fighter. During Frostval these nomadic wanderers from the north travel from town to town giving gifts and protecting those in need. You don't want to be on their naughty list though, else be on the receiving end of their most infamous gift - their pure rage.
Glacial Berserker Test (Class): [Duplicate of Warrior Class] Recommended enhancement: Fighter. This is the "test" version of the Glacial Berserker class so you can try it out in advance and let us know your thoughts on the skills. Once the class is ready to go live, these skills will change to the default warrior class. You can either keep the "test" version with the warrior class skills/art OR exchange it for a free version of the class armor in the IceWindWar Merge Shop.
Glacial Warlord (Class): Recommended enhancement: Fighter. Embrace the power of the glacier… and CRUSH YOUR ENEMIES! They will soon know the cold grasp of the grave thanks to the power you wield!
Great Thief: Recommended enhancement: Thief, Lucky. Heromart always needs new things to sell, and the BEST way to do that is to send an artifact hunter out to find more gear! (This item is non-refundable!)
Grim Necromancer (Class): When one ascends beyond the mere raising of bones, then one can be called Grim.
Grunge Rocker: [Duplicate of Nu Metal Necro Class]Recommended enhancement: Fighter/Luck Nu Metal Necros are a force to be reckoned with in a mosh pit. Like the band, they're die hard fans of, they utilize their deathly riffs, mighty voices, and necromantic abilities to crush their foes into submissions.
Healer: Recommended enhancement: Healer. Healers are servants of good who use their powers to aid the sick, weak, and injured. Their powerful healing magic is often the difference between a group's victory or doom.
Heavy Metal Necro: Recommended enhancement: Fighter/Luck Heavy Metal Necros are a force to be reckoned with in a mosh pit. Like the band, they're die hard fans of, they utilize their deathly riffs, mighty voices, and necromantic abilities to crush their foes into submissions.

Like the band, they're die hard fans of, they utilize their deathly riffs, mighty voices, and necromantic abilities to crush their foes into submissions.
Heroic Naval Commander: [Duplicate of Naval Commander Class] Recommended enhancement: Lucky, Thief. Yarrrr! True Naval commanders know they need to battle with a crew!
HighSeas Commander: Y'arrr! Th' Naval Commander is the scourge of the seven seas. An' for sailing with us for 10 years, ye've been awarded the Enchanted Naval Commander gear.
Hobo Highlord (Class): Comes with a sign: "Will work for souls".
Horc Evader (AC): Recommended enhancement: Thief. The Horcs have trained you in the arts of evasion. They have also shown you their secret art of beast lore. Command your Battle pet to fight for you!
Immortal Chronomancer (Class) (AC): [Duplicate of Eternal Chronomancer Class] Recommended Enhancement: Lucky. Immortal Chronomancers transcend space and time and can be in all dimensions and infinities at once. Others who control time revere them and are strengthened by their presence.
Immortal Chronomancer (Class) (Special): [Duplicate of Eternal Chronomancer Class] Recommended Enhancement: Lucky. Immortal Chronomancers transcend space and time and can be in all dimensions and infinities at once. Others who control time revere them and are strengthened by their presence.

Imperial Chunin: Recommended enhancement: Fighter. A chunin is a ninja field commander. Highly trained to attack from stealth but focusing on strength and power rather than agility and speed.
Infinite Dark Caster (0 AC): Channel the power of darkness to unleash your TRUE power! Recommended enhancement: Wizard.
Infinite Dark Caster (AC): Channel the power of darkness to unleash your TRUE power! Recommended enhancement: Wizard.
Infinite Legion Dark Caster: Channel the power of darkness to unleash your TRUE power! Recommended enhancement: Wizard.
Infinity Knight: Recommended enhancement: Hybrid. Protect Lore as you fight throughout all of space and time. Bestowing your opponent, converging time around them to devastate your foes!
Infinity Titan (Class): You're a great fighter, Hero. Come. Let this class help you help your friends in battle.
Legendary Hero (Class): Recommended enhancement: Fighter. You are truly one of Lore's greatest heroes! Because of your support and efforts in battle, the world will be saved!
Legendary Naval Commander: [Duplicate of Naval Commander Class] Recommended enhancement: Lucky, Thief. Yarrrr! True Naval commanders know they need to battle with a crew!
Legion BladeMaster Assassin: Recommended enhancement: Thief. Legion Blademaster Assassin are the brute ninjas of the Legion. With harsh lifestyles, they can overcome any punishment to them. While being swift and nimble, they also do massive amount of damage when on the brink of death.
Legion DoomKnight (Class) (0 AC): Recommended enhancement: Hybrid, Fighter. Even DoomKnights swear their service to, or are made to serve Dage. Their souls have been claimed by both Dage and Doom. (You unlocked this free version because you had the original class)
Legion DoomKnight (Class) (AC): Recommended enhancement: Hybrid, Fighter. Even DoomKnights swear their service to, or are made to serve Dage. Their souls have been claimed by both Dage and Doom.

Legion DoomKnight Tester: [Duplicate of Warrior Class] Recommended enhancement: Hybrid, Fighter. This is the "test" version of the NEW Legion DoomKnight Class. Try it out before it's live and let us know your thoughts. Once the class releases, the skills and art on this item will change to that of the Warrior Class. Keep the "test" version with the warrior class skills/art as a free souvenir of your participation.
Legion Evolved Dark Caster (Class): [Duplicate of Evolved Dark Caster Class] Recommended enhancement: Wizard. Channel the power of darkness to unleash your TRUE power!
Legion Paladin (Class): Recommended enhancement: Hybrid. Legion Paladins are the dishonest and evil protectors of… DAGE and DAGENESS! Heh, but really… You used to be a Paladin and now you're the undead minion of a seemingly invincible armored lich.
Legion Revenant (Class): Steeped in darkness, Legion Revenants derive their power from the essence responsible for the Legion's un-death. The Legion flows through them, and they are the Legion.
Legion Revenant Member Test: Recommended enhancement: Wizard. This is a temporary test version of Legion Revenant, the Tier 2 Dark Caster class. Skill icons and class art are temporary. Skills are subject to change. Please tweet
Legion SwordMaster Assassin: [Duplicate of Legion BladeMaster Assassin Class]Recommended enhancement: Thief. Legion Blademaster Assassin are the brute ninjas of the Legion. With harsh lifestyles, they can overcome any punishment to them. While being swift and nimble, they also do massive amount of damage when on the brink of death.
LightCaster (Class): Recommended enhancement: Wizard. The Order of the LightCasters formed to support the Champion of Light, and need every mage available to fight the battle against Chaos!
LightCaster Test: [Duplicate of Mage Class] Recommended enhancement: Wizard. The Order of the LightCasters formed to support the Champion of Light, and need every mage available to fight the battle against Chaos!
LightMage: Recommended enhancement: Wizard. The Order of the LightMages formed to support the Champion of Light, and need every mage available to fight the battle against Chaos!
Lord Of Order (0 AC): Recommended enhancements: Wizard, Lucky. The best line of defense against the corrupt forces of Chaos. They work to achieve Order and balance in the Mirror Realm.
Lord Of Order (AC): Recommended enhancements: Wizard, Lucky. The best line of defense against the corrupt forces of Chaos. They work to achieve Order and balance in the Mirror Realm.
Lord Of Order (Quest): Recommended enhancements: Wizard, Lucky. The best line of defense against the corrupt forces of Chaos. They work to achieve Order and balance in the Mirror Realm.
Love Caster (Class): Recommended enhancement: Wizard. Dage may be Evil, but what Beleen has done to his beloved Dark Caster armor is even more Evil… Yet totally awesome! If the power of love conquers all, then Love Casters shall adorably-dominate all of Lore!
Lycan (Class) (AC): Recommended enhancement: Fighter. So.. Who let the dogs out? Oh. You ARE the dog?… I sure hope your bark is worse than your bite. (Class will not go rare)
Mage: Recommended enhancement: Wizard. Magic courses through your veins. Your arcane powers enable you to cast powerful spells.
Master of Moglins (Class) (1): Recommended enhancement: Wizard. Thank you for your contribution to the 2018 Moglin Kickstarter! You have earned your place as a Master of Moglins and can call on them to assist you and your allies in battle!
Master of Moglins (Class) (2): Recommended enhancement: Wizard. Thank you for your contribution to the 2018 Moglin Kickstarter! You have earned your place as a Master of Moglins and can call on them to assist you and your allies in battle!
Master Ranger: [Duplicate of Ranger Class] Recommended enhancement: Thief. Rangers are stealthy, wealthy and wise to the ways of their opponents. Able to take down tyrants without blinking an eye or breaking a bowstring!
MechaJouster: Recommended enhancement: Fighter. Crash into battle on your clockwork steed!
Mystical Dark Caster: You've crafted a Mystical Dark Caster Class by purchasing an Arcane Dark Caster or Dark Gunner Armor. Congratulations! (This item cannot be used to unlock free armors.)
Naval Commander (Class): Recommended enhancement: Lucky, Thief. Yarrrr! True Naval commanders know they need to battle with a crew!
Nechronomancer: Recommended Enhancements: Lucky. Time and death, two things a dragon thought it would never fear.
Necromancer (AC): Recommended enhancement: Wizard. Embrace the Darkness that lies within you. Channel it to control the Undead that surround you. The darkest Power can be yours! (Must have minion or battle pet out for skills to work)
Necromancer (Merge): Recommended enhancement: Wizard. Embrace the Darkness that lies within you. Channel it to control the Undead that surround you. The darkest Power can be yours! (Must have minion
Necromancer (PTR): A PTR-only preview of the upcoming Necromancer class. This class will not have abilities on live servers, and will be disabled when PTR testing is complete.
Necrotic Chronomancer: Recommended Enhancements: Lucky. Time and death, two things a dragon thought it would never fear.
Ninja Warrior (Class): [Duplicate of Ninja Class] Recommended enhancement: Hybrid. A true Ninja Warrior knows that you only fail when you stop trying.
No Class: Recommended enhancement: Fighter. You may have heard of a rebel without a clue… well you are a player without a class! (This armor automatically equips when you have… no class.)
Northlands Monk (Class) (0 AC): Deep in the frozen mountains of the Northlands live a sect of Monks who derive all their power from the ice around them.
Northlands Monk (Class) (AC): Deep in the frozen mountains of the Northlands live a sect of Monks who derive all their power from the ice around them.
Northlands Monk (Class) (Free Player): Deep in the frozen mountains of the Northlands live a sect of Monks who derive all their power from the ice around them.
NOT A MOD: Recommended enhancement: Fighter. You're not a mod. You don't have any special powers. Sure, you're a pretty good swimmer and you whistle through your nose but it takes more than that to be an AQW Moderator.
Nu Metal Necro (1): Recommended enhancement: Fighter/Luck Nu Metal Necros are a force to be reckoned with in a mosh pit. Like the band, they're die hard fans of, they utilize their deathly riffs, mighty voices, and necromantic abilities to crush their foes into submissions.
Obsidian No Class: Recommended enhancement: Fighter. You may have heard of a rebel without a clue… well you are a player without a class! Painted black at the suggestion of fellow AQW hero, Georgia!
Oracle: Recommended enhancement: Spellbreaker. Oracles are strong healers and can see into everyone's future, past and present
Overworld Chronomancer (AC): Recommended Enhancement: Lucky, Hybrid. Time holds no meaning deep in the underworld… Unless you are a Chronomancer! Overworld Chronomancers rely on Hourglasses and Timepieces they create using their Hourglass Pet (equippable items found in shop via the pet) to manipulate and distort time itself. (This class is a variant of Underworld Chronomancer)
Paladin (Class): Recommended enhancement: Hybrid. Paladins are the honest and good protectors of… GOOD and GOODNESS! (Requires Rank 5 Good, Rank 10 Healer, Rank 10 Warrior to purchase.)
Paladin Highlord: Recommended enhancement: Hybrid. You have been chosen to lead the Paladin order into battle. All that is dark will break before you in waves as you shatter the forces of evil with your unique connection to the light!
PaladinSlayer: Recommended enhancement: Hybrid. YOU ARE A PALADINSLAYER. NO MERE MORTAL BOUND TO THE LIGHT CAN DEFY YOU! ALL WHO EXIST MUST BOW TO YOU SUPERIOR SKILLS AND MARTIAL ABILITIES.
Pink Romancer (Class): Recommended enhancement: Wizard. You have focused all of your considerable energy into the art of love and pinkomancy. The fires of love are now yours to control!
Pinkomancer: Recommended enhancement: Wizard. As the natural enemy to Paladins, Pinkomancers are powerful but adorably twisted magic users who command undead buddies!
Pirate: Recommended enhancement: Lucky. Pirates are opportunistic rogues and treasure hunters of the sea. Combat might not always go their way but they will do the best they can to make the most of any combat situation they find themselves in. You never really know what move a pirate will make next, and just as often, they don't know either.
ProtoSartorium (Class): Recommended enhancement: Hybrid. A mechanical marvel utilizing heat and steam to enhance your natural abilities as well as providing exceptional defenses.
Psionic MindBreaker: Recommended enhancement: Wizard. An exceptionally well trained MindBreaker, skilled in the art of psionic manipulation. You bend mental energy within yourself and your opponents to your will.
PvP Test - Bard: This class is used to test the upcoming PvP changes for classes within the PvP system. This item may change at any time. Refer to the Design Notes for information about the PvP system!
PvP Test - Healer: This class is used to test the upcoming PvP changes for classes within the PvP system. This item may change at any time. Refer to the Design Notes for information about the PvP system!
Pyromancer (Class) (AC): Recommended enhancement: Wizard. You have focused all of your considerable energy into mastering the art of fire magic. The flames are now yours to control!
Ranger: Recommended enhancement: Thief. Rangers are stealthy, wealthy and wise to the ways of their opponents. You'll range far and wide in this armor, gaining gold and glory!
Renegade: [Duplicate of Rogue Class] Recommended enhancement: Thief. Rogue base class upgrade!
Rogue: Recommended enhancement: Thief. Rogues follow their own set of rules. With a combination of speed, cunning and poisons you take your enemies by surprise.
Rogue (Rare): Recommended enhancement: Thief. Rogues follow their own set of rules. With a combination of speed, cunning and poisons, you take your enemies by surprise.
Royal BattleMage: [Duplicate of BattleMage Class] Recommended enhancement: Wizard, Lucky. Battlemages focus on taking down their opponents as quickly as possible. They are capable of focusing greater amounts of mana into each spell for the maximum effect.
Royal Vampire Lord (Class) (AC): [Duplicate of Vampire Lord Class] Recommended Enhancements: Wizard, Lucky. Vampire Lords rule over their sanguine servants and, feasting on the blood of mortals, they can live forever. Don't show one a mirror though, or you might not like what you don't see.
Royal Vampire Lord (Class) (Merge): [Duplicate of Vampire Lord Class] Recommended Enhancements: Wizard, Lucky. Vampire Lords rule over their sanguine servants and, feasting on the blood of mortals, they can live forever. Don't show one a mirror though, or you might not like what you don't see.
Sakura Cryomancer (Class): [Duplicate of Cryomancer Class] Recommended enhancement: Wizard. The pink never bothered you anyway. (And to everyone who rolled their eyes reading this, let it go.) (Inspired by fellow AQW hero, Penolia)
Scarlet Sorceress (0 AC): Recommended enhancement: Wizard. Blood Mages source their power from the blood in their veins. As for the Scarlet Sorceress, she focuses on the powers of her mirrors mixed in with Arcane energy.
Scarlet Sorceress (AC): Recommended enhancement: Wizard. Blood Mages source their power from the blood in their veins. As for the Scarlet Sorceress, she focuses on the powers of her mirrors mixed in with Arcane energy.
Sentinel: Recommended enhancement: Fighter. Sentinels are powerful and elite defenders of Lore.
Shadow Dragon Shinobi (Class) (AC): Recommended enhancement: Thief. Ninjas are hailed for their dexterity. Dragons are praised for their strength. And when the Ninja trains in the way of the Dragon, they shall become the Dragon Shinobi, master of brutal warfare!
Shadow Dragon Shinobi (Class) (Merge): Recommended enhancement: Thief. Ninjas are hailed for their dexterity. Dragons are praised for their strength. And when the Ninja trains in the way of the Dragon, they shall become the Dragon Shinobi, master of brutal warfare!
Shadow Ripper (Class): [Duplicate of Heavy Metal Necro Class] Recommended enhancement: Fighter/Luck Shadow Rippers are a force to be reckoned with in a mosh pit. Like the band they're die-hard fans of, they utilize their deathly riffs, mighty voices, and necromantic abilities to crush their foes into submission.
Shadow Rocker: [Duplicate of Nu Metal Necro Class]Recommended enhancement: Fighter/Luck Shadow Rockers are a force to be reckoned with in a mosh pit. Like the band, they're die hard fans of, they utilize their deathly riffs, mighty voices, and necromantic abilities to crush their foes into submissions.
ShadowFlame DragonLord (Class): [Duplicate of Dragonslayer General Class] Recommended enhancement: Fighter. Sometimes a DragonLord falls victim to the Shadow, no matter how hard they fight it.
ShadowScythe General (Class) (AC): Recommended enhancements: Lucky, Hybrid. By the power of Noxus, you have been reborn as an Undead General! Paladins, Lightcasters and even High Lords tremble at your dark presence.
ShadowScythe General (Class) (Merge): Recommended enhancements: Lucky, Hybrid. By the power of Noxus, you have been reborn as an Undead General! Paladins, Lightcasters and even High Lords tremble at your dark presence.
ShadowStalker of Time (Class): [Duplicate of ShadowWalker of Time] Recommended enhancement: Hybrid. These intrepid, timely explorers can step into a shadow in one time-stream and emerge from a completely different shadow in another time stream.
ShadowWalker of Time (Class): Recommended enhancement: Hybrid. What IS a Shadow Walker of Time, you ask? Good question! These intrepid, timely explorers can step into a shadow in one time-stream and emerge from a completely different shadow in another time stream.
ShadowWeaver of Time: Recommended enhancement: Hybrid. These intrepid, timely explorers can step into a shadow in one time-stream and emerge from a completely different shadow in another time stream.
Shaman: Recommended enhancement: Spellbreaker. Shamans share a deep connection with Lore's four main Elements, enabling their robes to be completely color customizable.
Silver Paladin: [Duplicate of Paladin Class] Recommended enhancement: Hybrid. Paladins are the honest and good protectors of… GOOD and GOODNESS!
SkyCharged Grenadier: This time you're the one yelling "Bombs Away!"
SkyGuard Grenadier (AC): Recommended enhancement: Fighter. Grenadiers are specially trained soldiers chosen for their fearlessness and are often picked to lead special assault teams. They pride themselves on being the first person through the hole they just blew through the wall of an enemy fortress.
Sorcerer: [Duplicate of Mage Class] Recommended enhancement: Wizard. Mage base class upgrade! (Requires Mage Class)
Soul Cleaver: [Duplicate of Exalted Harbinger Class] Recommended Enhancement: Luck. For the Legion, at any cost! Your task is to harness the souls of the enemies of the legion. Break, leech, rend, and snare their will to live. Lose yourself to the power, lose yourself to the legion!
Star Captain: Recommended enhancements: Lucky, Fighter. Star Captains are masters of ground, space, and Mecha combat that are trained to handle any threat they encounter. Unlocked by purchasing a Star Captain package in MechQuest.
StarLord: Recommended enhancement: Thief. MechQuest Star Captains are quick and dangerous warriors, having been trained equally in melee, ranged, and Mecha combat during their residency at GEARS University. Their innate depth-perception allows them to barrage multiple enemies at a distance, landing that critical first shot.
StoneCrusher (AC): Recommended enhancement: Healer. Infuse the natural magic of Shaman with the power of mother earth herself. Apply the tried and tested support aspects of Bard, and you have the ultimate class passed down for generations in Brightoak Grove!
StoneCrusher (Merge): Recommended enhancement: Healer. Infuse the natural magic of Shaman with the power of mother earth herself. Apply the tried and tested support aspects of Bard, and you have the ultimate class passed down for generations in Brightoak Grove!
SwordMaster Assassin (0 AC): [Duplicate of BladeMaster Assassin Class]Recommended enhancement: Thief. SwordMaster Assassins have always been a mystery, physically and mentally. Never seen by their foe, using the ancient ninja arts to help them overcome their enemies.
SwordMaster Assassin (AC): [Duplicate of BladeMaster Assassin Class]Recommended enhancement: Thief. SwordMaster Assassins have always been a mystery, physically and mentally. Never seen by their foe, using the ancient ninja arts to help them overcome their enemies.
SwordMaster (Class) (AC): [Duplicate of BladeMaster Class]Recommended enhancement: Thief. The shadowy assassins of the Undead Legion, SwordMasters move inhumanly fast. By the time you see them strike, their blades have already drawn blood.
The Collector (Class) (0 AC): Recommended enhancement: Hybrid. Last time you beat the Collector, now you are him! Bigger in the inside dome sold separately.
The Collector (Class) (AC): Recommended enhancement: Hybrid. Last time you beat the Collector, now you are him! Bigger in the inside dome sold separately.
The Collector (Class) (Merge): Recommended enhancement: Hybrid. Last time you beat the Collector, now you are him! Bigger in the inside dome sold separately.
Thief of Hours (AC): Recommended enhancement: Thief. Students of the Way of The Clock style of martial arts, these monks are trained to manipulate time magic to steal hours from their foes and use them to increase their own time to study and perfect their fighting style.
TimeKeeper: Recommended enhancement: Hybrid. On the battlefield, you give a new meaning to killing time. What time is it? Killing Time! When is it? Always!
TimeKiller: Recommended enhancement: Hybrid. On the battlefield, you give a new meaning to killing time. What time is it? Killing Time! When is it? Always!
Timeless Chronomancer (Class) (AC): Recommended Enhancements: Lucky, Hybrid. Timeless Chronomancers rely on Hourglasses and Corruption they create using their Hourglass Pet (equipable items found in the shop via your Timeless Hourglass Pet) to manipulate and distort time itself.
Timeless Chronomancer (Class) (Merge): Recommended Enhancements: Lucky, Hybrid. Timeless Chronomancers rely on Hourglasses and Corruption they create using their Hourglass Pet (equipable items found in the shop via your Timeless Hourglass Pet) to manipulate and distort time itself.
Timeless Dark Caster (0 AC): You have mastered every form of the arcane. Even among the Dark Casters, you are a legend. Recommended enhancement: Wizard. [Duplicate of Arcane Dark Caster Class].
Timeless Dark Caster (AC): You have mastered every form of the arcane. Even among the Dark Casters, you are a legend. Recommended enhancement: Wizard. [Duplicate of Arcane Dark Caster Class]
Timeless Dark Caster (Quest): You have mastered every form of the arcane. Even among the Dark Casters, you are a legend. Recommended enhancement: Wizard. [Duplicate of Mystical Dark Caster Class].
Troll Spellsmith (AC): Recommended enhancement: Wizard.— The Trolls are masters of magics and logic
Ultra Elemental Warrior: Recommended enhancement: Hybrid. You've wielded the 8 Elementals and are now able to MASTER them as an Ultra Elemental Warrior!
Ultra OmniKnight (AC): Recommended enhancement: Wizard. You've fought enemies across multiple different universes, learned to harness the unstable energies from their worlds required to stop them, and earned the right to call yourself an Ultra OmniKnight!
Ultra OmniKnight (Merge): Recommended enhancement: Wizard. You've fought enemies across multiple different universes, learned to harness the unstable energies from their worlds required to stop them, and earned the right to call yourself an Ultra OmniKnight!
Unchained Rocker: [Duplicate of Nu Metal Necro Class]Recommended enhancement: Fighter/Luck Unchained Rockers are a force to be reckoned with in a mosh pit. Like the band, they're die hard fans of, they utilize their deathly riffs, mighty voices, and necromantic abilities to crush their foes into submissions.
Unchained Rockstar: [Duplicate of Heavy Metal Necro Class]Recommended enhancement: Fighter/Luck Heavy Metal Necros are a force to be reckoned with in a mosh pit. Like the band, they're die hard fans of, they utilize their deathly riffs, mighty voices, and necromantic abilities to crush their foes into submissions.
Undead Goat: Recommended enhancement: Fighter. It's so baaaaaaa'd it's goat.
Undead Leperchaun (Legend): [Duplicate of Unlucky Leperchaun]Recommended enhancement: Lucky. There's lucky, there's unlucky and then there's un-dead-ky. You're the third. (Only available during the Friday the 13th / Lucky Day crossover event)
UndeadSlayer (AC): Recommended enhancement: Fighter. Wield the Light to save those trapped by the Darkness! Face down your foes, knowing that you have the power of Light, Might, and Right on your side!
Underworld Chronomancer (Class): Time holds no meaning deep in the underworld… Unless you are a Chronomancer! This class is a variant of Timeless Chronomancer.
Vampire: [Duplicate of Vampire Lord Class] Recommended Enhancements: Wizard, Lucky. Vampire Lords rule over their sanguine servants and, feasting on the blood of mortals, they can live forever. Don't show one a mirror though, or you might not like what you don't see.
Vampire Lord (Class) (AC): Recommended Enhancements: Wizard, Lucky. Vampire Lords rule over their sanguine servants and, feasting on the blood of mortals, they can live forever. Don't show one a mirror though, or you might not like what you don't see.
Vampire Lord (Class) (Merge): Recommended Enhancements: Wizard, Lucky. Vampire Lords rule over their sanguine servants and, feasting on the blood of mortals, they can live forever. Don't show one a mirror though, or you might not like what you don't see.
Vindicator Of They (AC): Recommended enhancement: Hybrid, Wizard. Through arduous battling and a perilous journey, you defeated the Collector and vindicated They Might Be Giants!
Vindicator Of They (Merge): Recommended enhancement: Hybrid, Wizard. Through arduous battling and a perilous journey, you defeated the Collector and vindicated They Might Be Giants!
Void Highlord (Class): Recommended enhancement: Fighter. Only the strongest, toughest, most dedicated (and insane) members of the Nulgath Nation can survive the trials required to unlock the Void Highlord Class!
Void Highlord (IoDA): This is a special IoDA version of the original class. It will not give any badges and cannot be used in any quests or shops which require the farmed version.
Warlord: [Duplicate of Warrior Class] Recommended enhancement: Fighter. Warrior base class upgrade!
Warrior (Class): Recommended enhancement: Fighter. The heart of a warrior is filled with courage and strength. Your skills with weapons in close combat make you a powerful force on the battlefield.
WarriorScythe General: [Duplicate of Warrior] Recommended enhancements: Lucky, Hybrid. Thanks for helping us test ShadowScythe General! This class is now a Warrior skin.
